title: Memory Closeout Residue Capture
goal: Make Memory guidance and templates capture useful closeout-derived durable residue without absorbing plan history.
non_goals: Do not copy archived plans into Memory.
Do not make Memory authoritative over active planning or canonical docs.

intent.outcome: Closeout can route useful but not-yet-canonical motivation, constraints, and lessons into compact Memory notes.
intent.constraints: Memory remains anti-rediscovery knowledge, not plan history, backlog, validation logs, or active execution state.
intent.latitude: Update memory workflow, templates, payload mirrors, and focused tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if implementation requires changing Memory authority semantics or broad manifest schema behavior.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, close #493, refresh external evidence, then promote the next durable-residue-routing slice.
execution.proof: Memory package tests, workspace CLI tests, ruff checks, memory/planning doctor, proof selector, and planning-surface check passed.

invariants: Memory captures compact durable residue only when future work should not rediscover it.
Planning remains the owner of active/current execution state.
Canonical docs/contracts/checks remain stronger homes after promotion.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Route durable motivation and lessons out of planning archives.

required_continuation.activation trigger: After #493 closes, promote the next open durable-residue-routing issue.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Planning closeout can route durable residue into Memory without relying on archived plan prose.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Docs/contracts/checks promotion routing and archive retention summaries.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Memory workflow and note templates now define closeout-derived residue fields, promotion target/trigger, retention-after-promotion, and anti-plan-history guardrails.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: Package proof and closeout checks passed.

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Continue implementing planned lanes in priority order while dogfooding package workflow.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Implement #493, the next open issue in the active durable-residue-routing lane.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that Memory receives compact durable residue fields and explicit anti-plan-history guidance.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Memory workflow/template payloads, focused package memory tests, this execplan, and planning state.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/memory; uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules memory --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any broad installer refactor or manifest schema migration.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Runtime CLI behavior unrelated to memory package payload or tests.

stop_conditions.stop when: Acceptance criteria for #493 are met, validated, archived, committed, pushed, and the issue is closed.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: If Memory needs to become authoritative for active planning or canonical docs.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: If changes spill into unrelated planning-state maturity or schema-validation lanes.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: If proof points to a larger package regression beyond #493.

context_budget.live working set: Memory workflow, memory-note template mirrors, memory installer tests, active execplan.
context_budget.recoverable later: Issue body #493 and archived closeout for #492.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Keep this execplan updated with next action and proof.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: memory-capture skill selected for this task.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Implementing #493 closeout-derived durable residue fields in Memory guidance/templates.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before moving to #494 or after validation failure.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Implement remaining planned work lane by lane.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package; commit/push per milestone; preserve repo-/agent-/tool-/language-agnostic shipped package behavior.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact wording and template section shape.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Authority model, broad surface footprint, or package architecture would change.

references.label: Capture useful but not-yet-canonical motivation from completed work

active_milestone.scope: Memory workflow/templates/tests for closeout-derived durable residue

immediate_next_action: Patch Memory workflow and templates with closeout-derived durable residue fields and anti-plan-history guardrails.
invariants: Memory is durable repo knowledge, not active planning state.
Closeout-derived Memory notes capture compact lessons, not archived plan history.
Promotion target and post-promotion retention are explicit.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Closeout-derived Memory note fields should include motivation, why it matters, load/use routing, promotion target, promotion trigger, and retention-after-promotion.
open_questions_to_close: Which exact template section names best support future capture without growing notes into reports?
validation_commands: cd packages/memory; uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules memory --format json
completion_criteria: Memory workflow clearly describes closeout-derived durable residue.
Memory note template supports promotion target and retention-after-promotion.
Planning closeout can route useful but not-canonical learning to Memory.
Tests or docs prevent plan-history dumps into Memory.

execution_run.what happened: Added closeout-derived residue guidance to Memory workflow and note templates, mirrored it into the shipped memory payload, aligned the package source template, and added package tests for the fields and anti-plan-history guardrail.
execution_run.scope touched: Memory workflow/template payloads, memory package template, package tests, planning state and active execplan
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/memory; uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules memory --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #493 acceptance is satisfied; #494 and #495 remain in durable-residue-routing.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package cheaper to use while preserving recoverable intent and proof.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Add compact routing fields, not new broad reading surfaces.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can durable lessons leave archived plans without turning Memory into plan history?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #493 is a bounded slice of #491; Memory capture guidance landed, while docs/contracts/checks promotion and retention-summary slices remain open.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: uv run pytest packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/memory; uv run ruff check .; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules memory --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py
closure_check.reopen trigger: A closeout-derived Memory note cannot record motivation, why-it-matters, use-when routing, promotion target/trigger, and retention-after-promotion without dumping plan history.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Closeout-derived lessons need an owner and promotion path so archived plans do not become the only durable source.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Memory should carry compact anti-rediscovery knowledge from completed work while preserving planning/docs/contracts as stronger homes.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: After #493 lands, continue #494/#495 for docs/contracts/checks and retention summaries.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Closeout-derived durable residue can now be captured in compact Memory notes without absorbing plan history.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Memory package tests, workspace CLI tests, ruff checks, proof selector, memory/planning doctor, and planning-surface check passed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: No new Memory note required; the durable lesson was promoted into the Memory workflow and template contract.

discard.summary: Discard implementation transcript, command output detail, and plan-history narration.

memory.summary: Closeout-derived residue belongs in compact Memory fields only when it preserves future-relevant motivation, constraint, or lesson without plan history.

issue_follow_up.summary: Capture useful but not-yet-canonical motivation from completed work
